description: Add WebSite + SoftwareApplication JSON-LD schema to homepage, add OG tags to all pages missing them, add CalculatorSchemaInjector (with FAQPage schema) to all calculator pages that currently only have SoftwareApplication schema, add schema and OG tags to editorial blog posts, and fix keyword targeting issues on Retirement Calculator and Indian Salary Calculator.
steps: 1. HOMEPAGE SCHEMA: In app/page.tsx, add WebSite JSON-LD schema (with SearchAction for site search) and SoftwareApplication JSON-LD. Import JsonLd from components/seo/JsonLd and render two JsonLd components at the top of the HomePage component. Also add openGraph metadata to the existing metadata export.

2. OG TAGS FOR CALCULATOR PAGES: Add openGraph property to metadata in all calculator pages that are missing it. Pages missing OG include: app/emergency-fund-calculator/page.tsx, app/fd-calculator/page.tsx, app/freelance-rate-calculator/page.tsx, app/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx, app/home-renovation-cost-estimator/page.tsx, app/import-duty/page.tsx, app/inflation/page.tsx, app/invoice-generator/page.tsx, app/moving-cost-calculator/page.tsx, app/neighborhood-explorer/page.tsx, app/rent-vs-buy-calculator/page.tsx, app/retirement-calculator/page.tsx, app/shipping-cost-calculator/page.tsx, app/solar-roi/page.tsx, app/in/property-registration-cost-calculator/page.tsx, app/in/rent-vs-buy-calculator/page.tsx, app/in/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx, app/business-loan-calculator/page.tsx, app/currency/page.tsx. Use the pattern: openGraph: { title: same-as-title, description: same-as-description, url: `${CANONICAL_DOMAIN}/path`, type: 'website' }

3. CALCULATORSCHEMAINJECTOR EXPANSION: Replace bare JsonLd+getCalculatorSchema usage with CalculatorSchemaInjector in all calculator pages that currently only inject SoftwareApplication. The calculatorType should map to the closest category in DEFAULT_FAQS (solar, tax, loan, investment, business, property, general). Pages to update: app/break-even-calculator/page.tsx (business), app/business-loan-calculator/page.tsx (loan), app/currency/page.tsx (general), app/debt-payoff-calculator/page.tsx (loan), app/emergency-fund-calculator/page.tsx (investment), app/fd-calculator/page.tsx (investment), app/freelance-rate-calculator/page.tsx (business), app/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx (loan), app/home-renovation-cost-estimator/page.tsx (property), app/import-duty/page.tsx (business), app/inflation/page.tsx (investment), app/invoice-generator/page.tsx (business), app/moving-cost-calculator/page.tsx (general), app/neighborhood-explorer/page.tsx (property), app/profit-margin-calculator/page.tsx (business), app/rent-vs-buy-calculator/page.tsx (property), app/retirement-calculator/page.tsx (investment), app/shipping-cost-calculator/page.tsx (business), app/solar-roi/page.tsx (solar), app/in/electricity-bill-calculator/page.tsx (general), app/in/emi-calculator/page.tsx (loan), app/in/fd-calculator/page.tsx (investment), app/in/gst-calculator/page.tsx (tax), app/in/gst-input-credit-calculator/page.tsx (tax), app/in/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx (loan), app/in/income-tax-calculator/page.tsx (tax), app/in/lpg-subsidy-calculator/page.tsx (general), app/in/ppf-calculator/page.tsx (investment), app/in/property-registration-cost-calculator/page.tsx (property), app/in/property-tax-calculator/page.tsx (property), app/in/salary-calculator/page.tsx (tax), app/in/sip-calculator/page.tsx (investment), app/in/stamp-duty-calculator/page.tsx (property), app/in/tds-calculator/page.tsx (tax), app/in/water-bill-calculator/page.tsx (general). For each: import CalculatorSchemaInjector, remove the old JsonLd import and getCalculatorSchema call if present, and add <CalculatorSchemaInjector> at the top of the component return.

4. EDITORIAL BLOG POSTS: Add Article JSON-LD schema and OG tags to the 6 editorial blog posts that don't use BlogLayout: app/blog/sip-vs-lumpsum/page.tsx, app/blog/new-vs-old-tax-regime/page.tsx, app/blog/rent-vs-buy-math/page.tsx, app/blog/snowball-vs-avalanche/page.tsx, app/blog/retirement-corpus-guide/page.tsx, app/blog/ppf-guide/page.tsx, app/blog/ctc-vs-in-hand/page.tsx, app/blog/emergency-fund-importance/page.tsx, app/blog/fd-vs-mutual-funds/page.tsx, app/blog/gst-inclusive-vs-exclusive/page.tsx, app/blog/home-loan-prepayment-benefits/page.tsx. For each: add openGraph to metadata, and add a JsonLd component with getArticleSchema() from lib/seo-utils at the top of the component.

5. KEYWORD FIX - RETIREMENT CALCULATOR: In app/retirement-calculator/page.tsx, change metadata title from 'Retirement Planner | CostSmart' to 'Retirement Calculator | CostSmart'. Change openGraph title similarly. Change the H1 from 'Retirement Planner' to 'Retirement Calculator'. Keep the description and other content the same.

6. KEYWORD FIX - INDIAN SALARY CALCULATOR: In app/in/salary-calculator/page.tsx, change the H1 from 'CTC to In-Hand Salary' to 'Salary Calculator India' to match search intent. Keep the subtitle explaining CTC-to-in-hand. The metadata title 'Salary Calculator India | CostSmart' is already correct.
acceptance_criteria: Homepage has WebSite JSON-LD schema with name CostSmart and SearchAction, plus SoftwareApplication schema
All calculator pages have CalculatorSchemaInjector (providing both SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schema)
All editorial blog posts have Article JSON-LD schema and openGraph tags
Retirement Calculator page title and H1 contain 'Calculator' not 'Planner'
Indian Salary Calculator H1 says 'Salary Calculator India'
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/cost-smart && npx next build -- should succeed with no errors
Run: grep -n 'CalculatorSchemaInjector' /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/app/retirement-calculator/page.tsx -- should find the component
Run: grep -n 'WebSite' /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/app/page.tsx -- should find WebSite schema
Run: grep -rn 'openGraph' /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/app/blog/sip-vs-lumpsum/page.tsx -- should find OG tags
